## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership opportunities between Octave and GrowthX in the AI-powered go-to-market space.](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Octave specializes in go-to-market context engines and high-velocity outbound campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [GrowthX focuses on AI-powered content creation and marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Both companies use AI to enhance efficiency and quality in their respective domains](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Potential collaboration areas: shared events, API integration, and mutual business development](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)

## Topics

### Company Backgrounds

  - [Zach (Octave): Sales background, co-founded content moderation startup (acquired by Twitter), started Octave in 2022](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Marcel (GrowthX): CMO background, founded GrowthX to provide AI-powered marketing services, reached $10M revenue with 70 employees](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Tyler (GrowthX): Week 3 as first AE, background in enterprise software and content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)

### Octave's Offering

  - [Go-to-market context engine with API-driven agents for specific tasks](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [Library of core primitives (products, services, personas)](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [Playbooks for tailored selling approaches](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Tightly scoped agents for tasks like qualification and outbound campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Integration with platforms like Clay for workflow automation](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [AI-powered content creation and marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Internal platform for service delivery](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Workflow engine with coding agents for efficient content production](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Comprehensive process from ideation to publishing, including fact-checking and image generation](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Mutual event participation (e.g., CMO breakfasts, inbound marketing party)](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Sharing of context and artifacts between platforms](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
  - [API integration to enhance onboarding and service delivery](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Exploring how Octave's context engine could benefit GrowthX's content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send Zach invitations to upcoming events, including the inbound marketing party](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1883.0)
  - [Zach to create a shared Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
  - [Marcel to share recording of recent GrowthX workshop](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [Zach to explore integration possibilities with Engine team and report back](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Schedule in-person coffee meeting to discuss further collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/TnB8_VbpXR5c_DLyxqTNzKULyP155fFS?tab=summary&timestamp=1932.0)

action_items.description: Send Zach invite to inbound party, other events, shared channel
Send Zach link to 2-hour workshop recording from 2 weeks ago
Create Slack channel for collaboration with GrowthX
Talk to James & Engine team re sharing artifacts/integrating w/ GrowthX
